description_short: Austin is the Texas state capital and one of the fastest-growing metros, facing flash floods, hail, tornadoes, and extreme summer heat.
description_long: Located in the Texas Hill Country along the Colorado River, Austin sits on the edge of Flash Flood Alley and experiences severe spring thunderstorms with large hail and tornadoes, extreme summer heat, and occasional winter ice events. Travis County is served by NWS Austin/San Antonio (office code EWX) within forecast zone TXZ192 (Travis).
